## What does this PR do?

<!--
  One paragraph description of what this PR changes and why.
  Link to a related issue if one exists.
  Fixes #(issue number)
-->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style / code cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test update (adding or updating tests only)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / dependency update

## Packages affected

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `verino` (core + vanilla adapter)
- [ ] `@verino/react`
- [ ] `@verino/vue`
- [ ] `@verino/svelte`
- [ ] `@verino/alpine`
- [ ] `@verino/web-component`
- [ ] Docs / examples only

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] TypeScript check passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Tested in Chrome
- [ ] Tested in Firefox
- [ ] Tested in Safari
- [ ] Tested on mobile (iOS or Android)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have added tests that cover my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects a published package
- [ ] This PR is ready for review (not a draft)
